name: Nuta-ae (Seafood and Spring Onions in Miso Dr
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the seafood thoroughly.
2. Prepare a mixture of equal parts white vinegar, sugar, salt, and grated miso paste.
3. Place the seafood in a shallow container or wrap in plastic wrap.
4. Pour the dressing over the seafood, ensuring it is evenly coated.
5. Let marinate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to develop.
6. Remove the seafood from the marinade and discard any remaining liquid.
7. Serve with spring onions as desired.
